debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ InductiveTable.Completeness (F p) State unit (fun x x => True) (fun x => True)
    (fun initial_state x i x state =>
      @Examples.FemtoCairo.nextStateCircuit.match_3 p (fun x => Prop)
        (Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i)
        (fun reachedState => state = reachedState) fun _ => False)
    fun state x =>
    (fun input =>
        subcircuitWithAssertion
          (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program h_programSize
            memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
          input)
      state

failed_attempts:
intros initial_state i env state_var input_var state input next_state h_inputs h_spec_current h_spec_next
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec_current h_spec_next
    split at h_spec_current
    case h_2 => contradiction
    case h_1 reached_state h_eq =>
      subst h_eq
      simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_spec_next
      split at h_spec_next
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 next_reached h_eq_next =>
        subst h_eq_next
        apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize
        · simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]
        · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
          assumption

intros initial_state i env state_var input_var state input h1 h2 h_inputs h_spec
    apply GeneralFormalCircuit.completeness
    simp only [femtoCairoAssumptions, Spec, femtoCairoCircuitSpec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at *
    rcases h_inputs with ⟨rfl, h_prev⟩
    split at h_spec <;> simp_all

intros initial_state _ i _ state next_state h_i h_next
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_i h_next
    split at h_i
    · subst h_i
      split at h_next
      · apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
        · trivial
        · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
          assumption
      · contradiction
    · contradiction

intros initial_state i env state_var input_var state input h1 h2 h_inputs
    dsimp [Spec] at h1 h2
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h2
    split at h1 <;> try contradiction
    subst h1
    simp only [Option.bind_some] at h2
    split at h2 <;> try contradiction
    subst h2
    apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness
    · trivial
    · simp_all [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]

intros initial_state _ i _ state h_spec
    split
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      exact h_spec
    · rename_i n
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h_spec
      cases h_exec : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) n
      · simp [h_exec] at h_spec
      · rename_i prev
        exists prev
        simp [h_exec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
        constructor
        · rfl
        · apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
          · exact True.intro
          · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
            simp [h_exec] at h_spec
            exact h_spec

intros initial_state _ i _ state h
    induction i generalizing state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      subst h
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      cases h_exec : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i
      case none =>
        simp [h_exec] at h
        contradiction
      case some s' =>
        simp [h_exec] at h
        cases h_trans : Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition program memory s'
        case none =>
          simp [h_trans] at h
          contradiction
        case some s'' =>
          simp [h_trans] at h
          subst h
          simp [circuit_norm]
          exists s'
          constructor
          · exact ih s' h_exec
          · apply GeneralFormalCircuit.completeness
            · trivial
            · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans]

intros initial_state _ i
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, circuit_norm]
      rintro rfl
      exact ⟨Vector.nil, trivial⟩
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      intro final_state h
      split at h
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 next_state h_trans =>
        obtain ⟨w_rest, h_valid_rest⟩ := ih next_state h
        have h_step_spec : femtoCairoCircuitSpec program memory initial_state next_state := by
          simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans]
        obtain ⟨w_step, h_valid_step⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
          initial_state next_state h_step_spec trivial
        exists Vector.cons w_step w_rest
        simp [circuit_norm]
        constructor
        · exact h_valid_step
        · exact h_valid_rest

intros s0 _ i _ s h_spec
    induction i generalizing s0
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      subst h_spec
      exists Vector.nil
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
      rename_i s1 h_trans
      obtain ⟨trace, h_trace⟩ := ih s1 _ _ h_spec
      have h_c := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness s0 s1
      simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans, femtoCairoAssumptions] at h_c
      obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := h_c
      exists Vector.cons w trace
      simp [circuit_norm]
      exact ⟨hw, h_trace⟩

intros initial_state i state next_state h_state h_next
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_state h_next
    split at h_state
    case h_2 => contradiction
    case h_1 s_i h_eq_i =>
      subst h_state
      simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
      split at h_next
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 s_next' h_trans =>
        subst h_next
        apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
        · exact True.intro
        · simp only [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans]

intros initial_state input i current_state next_state h_current h_next
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h_next
    split at h_current
    case h_2 => contradiction
    case h_1 s h_exec =>
      subst h_current
      rw [h_exec] at h_next
      simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
      split at h_next
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 s' h_trans =>
        subst h_next
        apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
        · trivial
        · simp only [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
          rw [h_trans]

intros initial_state _ i _ state next_state h_curr h_next
    apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness
    · simp only [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
      simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_curr h_next
      split at h_curr <;> simp_all
      split at h_next <;> simp_all
    · simp only [femtoCairoAssumptions]

intros initial_state _ i
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      rintro _ rfl
      exists []
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ n ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      intro h
      split at h
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 s_next h_step =>
        have h_spec : femtoCairoCircuitSpec program memory initial_state s_next := by
          simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_step]
        obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize initial_state s_next trivial h_spec
        obtain ⟨trace, h_trace⟩ := ih s_next h
        exists w :: trace
        simp [circuit_norm, hw, h_trace]

intros initial_state i
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      rintro rfl; use []; simp
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      intro h; split at h
      · contradiction
      · rename_i s h_exec
        obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := ih h_exec
        obtain ⟨ws, hs1, hs2⟩ := femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize s trivial
        use w ++ ws
        simp [hw, hs2]
        simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec] at hs1
        rw [h] at hs1
        exact hs1

intros initial_state _ i _ _ _ _ h_spec
    induction i using Fin.induction
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      simp [h_spec]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      rcases h_exec : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i with _ | prev_state
      · simp [h_exec] at h_spec; contradiction
      · simp [h_exec] at h_spec
        rcases h_trans : Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition program memory prev_state with _ | next_state
        · simp [h_trans] at h_spec; contradiction
        · simp [h_trans] at h_spec
          subst h_spec
          exists prev_state
          constructor
          · apply ih; simp [h_exec]
          · apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
            · exact femtoCairoAssumptions prev_state
            · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans]

intros initial_state i _ final_state _ _ h_spec
    induction i generalizing final_state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      subst h_spec
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 s_i h_exec =>
        split at h_spec
        case h_2 => contradiction
        case h_1 s_next h_trans =>
          subst h_spec
          simp [circuit_norm]
          exists s_i
          constructor
          · apply ih; exact h_exec
          · apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize
            · exact h_trans
            · trivial

intros initial_state _ i _ state h
    induction i generalizing state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      subst h
      simp [circuit_norm]
      exists .nil
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h
      split at h
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 prev h_prev_eq =>
        specialize ih prev
        simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at ih
        rw [h_prev_eq] at ih
        specialize ih rfl
        obtain ⟨w_prev, h_w_prev⟩ := ih
        split at h
        case h_2 => contradiction
        case h_1 next h_next_eq =>
          subst h
          let step := femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize
          have h_step : step.Spec prev state := by
            simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_next_eq]
          have h_asm : step.Assumptions prev := trivial
          obtain ⟨w_step, h_w_step⟩ := step.completeness prev state h_step h_asm
          simp [circuit_norm]
          exists .cons w_prev w_step
          exact ⟨h_w_prev, h_w_step⟩

intros
    simp only [Spec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at *
    split at *
    · apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
      · exact femtoCairoAssumptions _
      · simp_all [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]
    · contradiction

intros initial_state _ i _ state next_state h_current h_next
    simp only [Spec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h_current h_next
    split at h_next
    · rename_i s h_bound
      simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
      rw [h_bound] at h_current
      subst h_current
      split at h_next
      · rename_i s_next h_trans
        subst h_next
        apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness
        · trivial
        · unfold femtoCairoCircuitSpec
          rw [h_trans]
      · contradiction
    · contradiction

intros initial_state i
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      intro state h
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      subst h
      exists []
      simp [circuit_norm]
    | succ i ih =>
      intro state h
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      split at h
      · contradiction
      · rename_i prev_state h_exec
        obtain ⟨w_prev, h_prev⟩ := ih _ h_exec
        have h_step_spec : femtoCairoCircuitSpec program memory prev_state state := by
          simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h, eq_comm]
        obtain ⟨w_step, h_step⟩ := femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize _ _ h_step_spec trivial
        exists w_prev ++ w_step
        simp [circuit_norm]
        use w_prev, w_step
        simp [h_prev, h_step]

intros initial_state _ i _ state next_state h_i h_succ
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_succ
    split at h_i <;> try contradiction
    subst h_i
    simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_succ
    split at h_succ <;> try contradiction
    apply GeneralFormalCircuit.Completeness.completeness
    · trivial
    · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_succ]

intros initial_state _ i _ state h_spec
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    case zero =>
      exists Vector.nil
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, circuit_norm] at h_spec ⊢
      assumption
    case succ n ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      cases h_step : Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition program memory initial_state
      · simp [h_step] at h_spec; contradiction
      · rename_i next_state
        simp [h_step] at h_spec
        obtain ⟨trace_rest, h_rest⟩ := ih next_state h_spec
        have h_step_complete := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
        obtain ⟨trace_step, h_step_valid⟩ := h_step_complete initial_state trivial next_state (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_step])
        exists Vector.cons trace_step trace_rest
        simp [circuit_norm]
        exact ⟨h_step_valid, h_rest⟩

intros initial_state i
    induction i
    case zero =>
      intros state input h_spec
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      subst h_spec
      exists ()
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      intros state input h_spec
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      rcases h_exec : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i with _ | prev_state
      · simp [h_exec] at h_spec; contradiction
      · simp [h_exec] at h_spec
        split at h_spec
        case h_2 => contradiction
        case h_1 h_trans =>
          subst h_spec
          obtain ⟨w_prev, h_prev⟩ := ih prev_state input (by simp [h_exec])
          obtain ⟨w_step, h_step⟩ := femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize prev_state state trivial (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans])
          exists (w_prev, w_step)
          simp [circuit_norm]
          exact ⟨h_prev, h_step⟩

intros initial_state _ i input output h_in h_out
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_out
    cases h : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i
    · rw [h] at h_in; contradiction
    · rw [h] at h_in; simp only at h_in; subst h_in
      rw [h, Option.bind_some] at h_out
      apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
      · trivial
      · split at h_out <;> simp_all

intros initial_state i s_prev s_next h_prev h_next
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_prev h_next
    split at h_prev <;> simp_all
    simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
    split at h_next <;> simp_all
    apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
    · trivial
    · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
      assumption

intros _ _ _ _ state _
    apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness
    simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]

intros initial_state _ i _ state h_spec
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      subst h_spec
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 s1 h_step =>
        have h_c := femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness program h_programSize memory h_memorySize
        obtain ⟨w1, hw1⟩ := h_c initial_state s1 trivial (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_step])
        obtain ⟨w2, hw2⟩ := ih s1 h_spec
        exists (w1, w2)
        simp [circuit_norm]
        exact ⟨hw1, hw2⟩

intros initial_state _ trace h_spec i
    apply femtoCairoStepCircuitCompleteness
    · trivial
    · specialize h_spec i
      specialize h_spec (i + 1)
      simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec
      · simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_spec
        split at h_spec
        · simp_all [femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
        · contradiction
      · contradiction

intros initial_state i s_prev s_next h_prev h_next
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_prev h_next
    rw [h_prev] at h_next
    simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
    apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
    · simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]
    · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_next]

intros s₀ _ i _ s_end _ h_spec
    induction i generalizing s₀ with
    | zero =>
      exists Vector.nil
      simp_all [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, circuit_norm]
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      rcases h_trans : Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition program memory s₀ with _ | s₁
      · simp_all
      · simp [h_trans] at h_spec
        obtain ⟨w_rest, h_rest⟩ := ih s₁ h_spec
        obtain ⟨w_step, h_step_sat⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness s₀ trivial (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans])
        exists w_step ++ w_rest
        simp [circuit_norm, h_rest, h_step_sat.2]

intros initial_state _ i _ state h_current next_state h_next
    dsimp [Spec] at h_current h_next
    simp only [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_next
    split at h_current <;> try contradiction
    subst h_current
    simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_next
    split at h_next
    case h_2 => contradiction
    case h_1 s h_trans =>
      subst h_next
      apply GeneralFormalCircuit.completeness
      · simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans]

intros initial_state _ i _ state h
    induction i generalizing state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      subst h
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      cases h_prev : Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i
      case none => simp [h_prev] at h
      case some s_prev =>
        simp [h_prev] at h
        have h_step : femtoCairoCircuitSpec program memory s_prev state := by
          simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h]
        obtain ⟨w_step, hw_step⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness s_prev trivial h_step
        obtain ⟨w_prev, hw_prev⟩ := ih s_prev (by simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, h_prev])
        exists Vector.append w_prev (Vector.singleton w_step)
        simp [circuit_norm]
        exists s_prev
        exact ⟨hw_prev, hw_step⟩

intros initial_state _ i _ state _ h_spec
    induction i generalizing state
    case zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      subst h_spec
      simp [circuit_norm]
    case succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec
      case h_2 => contradiction
      case h_1 prev_state h_prev =>
        specialize ih prev_state h_prev
        simp [circuit_norm]
        exists prev_state
        constructor
        · exact ih
        · apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
          · simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]
          · simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_spec]
